title: Crispy Bitter Beef Cutlet
description: A monsoon-inspired dish featuring tender beef cutlets seasoned with bitter flavors and a crispy exterior, perfect for the paleo diet.

ingredients.name: bitter ingredients (e.g., bitter orange or green tea extract)

instructions: Season the beef cubes with salt, black pepper, bitter ingredients, and ginger juice.
Dip each cubed meat in coconut oil before placing it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Turn halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
